=== CONCLUSION ===
Both M6 and M7 show that the normalised fraction of positive citation contexts (N'_pos) increases with reproducibility score, while the fraction of negative contexts (N'_neg) decreases. The ratio r = N'_pos/N'_neg magnifies this trend. This supports the paper's claim that citation context sentiment can serve as a signal of reproducibility in ML papers.
